## Environment information
* Mod version: 
* Fabric loader version: 
* Minecraft version: 

## Describe the issue
<!-- This section is what determines if your issue will be successfully fixed. Please, don't write "it doesn't work", instead, describe with details the issue, including steps to reproduce it, the results and particularities of the problem you're facing. -->
* What did you do?
* What did you expect?
* What did you get?

## Regression
<!-- This section serves to understand if the issue you encountered is caused by recent updates of this mod. If it's your first time using mod or you can't remember estimated period of time when a certain feature used to work, leave this section blank. -->
* Did it use to work?
* If so, when did you start experiencing the issue?

## Logs and attachments
<!-- Attach any logs, videos or screenshots to provide additional information of your problem, otherwise leave it blank -->
